2604.09253.title: Mosaic: Multimodal Jailbreak against Closed-Source VLMs via Multi-View Ensemble Optimization
2604.09253.paper_summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are powerful but remain vulnerable to multimodal jailbreak attacks. Existing attacks mainly rely on either explicit visual prompt attacks or gradient-based adversarial optimization. While the former is easier to detect, the latter produces subtle perturbations that are less perceptible, but is usually optimized and evaluated under homogeneous open-source surrogate-target settings, leaving its effectiveness on commercial closed-source VLMs under heterogeneous settings unclear. To examine this issue, we study different surrogate-target settings and observe a consistent gap between homogeneous and heterogeneous settings, a phenomenon we term surrogate dependency. Motivated by this finding, we propose Mosaic, a Multi-view ensemble optimization framework for multimodal jailbreak against closed-source VLMs, which alleviates surrogate dependency under heterogeneous surrogate-target settings by reducing over-reliance on any single surrogate model and visual view. Specifically, Mosaic incorporates three core components: a Text-Side Transformation module, which perturbs refusal-sensitive lexical patterns; a Multi-View Image Optimization module, which updates perturbations under diverse cropped views to avoid overfitting to a single visual view; and a Surrogate Ensemble Guidance module, which aggregates optimization signals from multiple surrogate VLMs to reduce surrogate-specific bias. Extensive experiments on safety benchmarks demonstrate that Mosaic achieves state-of-the-art Attack Success Rate and Average Toxicity against commercial closed-source VLMs.
2604.09253.paper_summary_zh: 視覺-語言模型（VLMs）功能強大，但仍然容易受到多模態越獄攻擊的威脅。現有的攻擊主要依賴於明確的視覺提示攻擊或基於梯度的對抗優化。雖然前者較容易被檢測，但後者產生的微妙擾動不易察覺，且通常在同質的開源替代目標設置下進行優化和評估，這使得其在商業閉源VLMs的異質設置下的有效性不明。為了檢查這個問題，我們研究了不同的替代目標設置，並觀察到同質與異質設置之間存在一致的差距，這一現象我們稱之為替代依賴。受到這一發現的啟發，我們提出了Mosaic，一個針對閉源VLMs的多視角集成優化框架，用以緩解異質替代目標設置下的替代依賴，通過減少對任何單一替代模型和視覺視圖的過度依賴來實現。具體而言，Mosaic包含三個核心組件：一個文本側轉換模塊，擾動拒絕敏感的詞彙模式；一個多視角圖像優化模塊，在多樣化的裁剪視圖下更新擾動，以避免對單一視覺視圖的過擬合；以及一個替代集成指導模塊，聚合來自多個替代VLMs的優化信號，以減少替代特定的偏差。在安全基準上的大量實驗表明，Mosaic在商業閉源VLMs上實現了最先進的攻擊成功率和平均毒性。
2604.09253.author: Yuqin Lan et.al.
2604.09253.authors: Yuqin Lan, Gen Li, Yuanze Hu, Weihao Shen, Zhaoxin Fan, Faguo Wu, Xiao Zhang, Laurence T. Yang, Zhiming Zheng
